label: C360 431 - Logic Fiber Newsale Feil nummer Campaign
name: C360_431_Logic_Fiber_Newsale_Feil_nummer_Campaign

fields.formulaExpression:
case 
	when "CompanyFamily__c"='TELENORBUTIKKEN O365'
    then 1
    else 0
    end
fields.label: TN_butikken
fields.name: TN_butikken

fields.formulaExpression:
case when"CustomerType__c" = 'BRL'
then 1
when "CustomerType__c" = 'ESEK' then 1
when "NACE_Subclass_Code__c" = '68201' then 1
when "NACE_Subclass_Code__c" ='68209' then 1
when ("CustomerType__c" ='FLI' and "NumberOfEmployees" = 0)
then 1
else 0
end
fields.label: Borettslag_FLI
fields.name: Borettslag_FLI

fields.formulaExpression:
case when
"StatusKURT__c"= 'K - Personen/foretaket er OK, levende'
then 0 else 1
end
fields.label: Ikke_levende kunder
fields.name: Ikke_levende_kunder

fields.formulaExpression:
case when
"Phonenumber_type__c" = 'mobil' then 0
when "Phonenumber_type__c" ='pots' then 0
else 1
end
fields.label: phonetype not dialer
fields.name: Phone_type_not_dialer

fields.formulaExpression:
case 
	when 
    Has_subscription = 0 and
        (contains("Name", 'HOLDING'))
    then 1
    when 
     Has_subscription = 0 and
    (contains("Name", 'Holding'))
    then 1
    else 0
    end
fields.label: Holding
fields.name: Holding

fields.formulaExpression:
case 
When Has_subscription =0 and
"NACE_Subclass_Description__c" ='Andre kombinerte tjenester tilknyttet eiendomsdrift' then 1
When Has_subscription =0 and
 "NACE_Subclass_Description__c" ='Eiendomsforvaltning' then 1
when Has_subscription =0 and
"NACE_Subclass_Description__c" ='Eiendomsmegling' then 1
when Has_subscription =0 and 
"NACE_Subclass_Description__c" ='Finansielle holdingselskaper' then 1
when Has_subscription =0 and
"NACE_Subclass_Description__c" ='Kjøp og salg av egen fast eiendom' then 1
when Has_subscription =0 and
"NACE_Subclass_Description__c" ='Leasing av immateriell eiendom og lignende produkter' then 1
when Has_subscription =0 and
"NACE_Subclass_Description__c" ='Spesielle holdingselskaper' then 1
when Has_subscription =0 and
"NACE_Subclass_Description__c" ='Utleie av egen eller leid fast eiendom ellers' then 1
when Has_subscription =0 and
"NACE_Subclass_Description__c" ='Utvikling og salg av egen fast eiendom ellers' then 1
when Has_subscription =0 and
"NACE_Subclass_Description__c" ='unntatt opphavsrettsbeskyttede verker' then 1
else 0
end
fields.label: Eiendom
fields.name: Eiendom

fields.formulaExpression:
case 
when Has_subscription = 0
and (Holding = 1 or Eiendom = 1) then 1
else 0
end
fields.label: Eiendom_holding_ikke_TN
fields.name: Eiendom_holding_ikke_TN

fields.formulaExpression:
case when "Reservation_Date_IA_Outbound__c" > NOW() then 1
else 0
end
fields.label: Outbound_Contact_recency
fields.name: Outbound_Contact_recency

fields.formulaExpression:
case when
TN_butikken = 1 or Ikke_levende_kunder = 1 
or Borettslag_FLI = 1 or Svalbard = 1  or creditrating = 1 or Blacklist = 1 or Dodsbo = 1 or tm_reservation = 1 or Phone_type_not_dialer = 1 or Eiendom_holding_ikke_TN = 1 or ENK_ikke_TN_kunde = 1 or VPFO_ikke_tn_0_ansatte= 1
then 1
else 0
end
fields.label: Suppression_hard_TM
fields.name: Suppression_hard_TM

fields.formulaExpression:
case when
Opportunity_Fiber_flag = 1 or Opportunity_Fiber_leads = 1 or Case_IA_Open = 1 or Case_canceled = 1 then 1
else 0
end
fields.label: Suppression_soft_TM
fields.name: Suppression_soft_TM

fields.label: Type_kunde
fields.name: Type_kunde

fields.formulaExpression:
case 
when "Has_subscription" = 0
and "CustomerType__c" = 'ENK' and Have_buildingtype ='1' then 1
else 0
end
fields.label: ENK ikke TN kunde buildningtype
fields.name: ENK_ikke_TN_kunde

fields.formulaExpression:
case 
when Has_subscription = 0
and "CustomerType__c" = 'VPFO' and "NumberOfEmployees" = 0 then 1
else 0
end
fields.label: VPFO ikke TN 0 ansatte
fields.name: VPFO_ikke_tn_0_ansatte

fields.label: Fibercost gruppe
fields.name: Fibercost_gruppe
